title: Kitten Totem (All Black)
description: This RP changes the Totem to the All Black Baby Cat.
body: This Resource Pack changes the Totem to the All Black Baby Cat. The Totem doesn't changes then the Original All Black Kitten changes from Resource Packs. It changes the Totem Texture and Model, so please don't use Resource Packs on Top of these, that changes the Texture of the Totem... Here are all [Kitten Totem Resource Packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/UuL4BZ7D).
